title: Agent
description: An autonomous agent identified by a Solana wallet. Captures on-chain activity provenance and a reputation score so other agents (and the humans paying them) can decide whether to transact. v1.2.

pubkey.description: Base58-encoded Solana public key for the agent's primary wallet. 32–44 chars.

cluster.description: Solana cluster the activity was observed on.

name.description: Human label for the agent, when known. E.g. 'jupiter-router-bot', 'sol-agent-wallet'.

firstSeen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the earliest observed transaction for this pubkey.

lastSeen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent observed transaction.

txCount.description: Number of transactions observed in the ingest window.

peerCount.description: Count of distinct counterparty wallets the agent has interacted with.

failureRatio.description: Fraction of observed transactions that errored on-chain (0.0 = none failed, 1.0 = all failed).

sanctionedNeighborCount.description: Count of distinct counterparties that appear on a sanctions/blocklist. v1.2 uses a caller-supplied list; future versions will hook OFAC + Chainalysis feeds.

score.description: Trust score 0–100. 0 = do not transact, 100 = maximum reputation. Computed by the active scorer.

scoreVersion.description: Identifier for the scoring algorithm that produced `score`. Lets consumers know which model they're reading.

scoreReasoning.description: Human-readable breakdown of which factors moved the score. Required for v1-heuristic (transparency); optional for v2-llm-judge.

scoredAt.description: When the score field was computed.

sourceCommit.description: git sha of the gmem build that produced this record. Lets you reproduce a score.
